description: MLflow MCP — experiments, runs, registered models, versions, traces, assessments (MLflow 3)
name: io.github.us-all/mlflow

environmentVariables.description: MLflow tracking server URI (e.g. http://localhost:5050, https://mlflow.example.com).
environmentVariables.name: MLFLOW_TRACKING_URI

environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for authenticated MLflow servers (e.g. Databricks).
environmentVariables.name: MLFLOW_TRACKING_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Default experiment ID for run-creation tools.
environmentVariables.name: MLFLOW_EXPERIMENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated category allowlist. Default: all categories enabled.
environmentVariables.name: MLFLOW_TOOLS

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to enable write/destructive tools. Default read-only.
environmentVariables.name: MLFLOW_ALLOW_WRITE
